title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 29–32, this part focuses on Unknown person #25, Zoro, Unknown person #26, Unknown person #27, Unknown person #28, Luffy as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.text: IF I DON'T... AT THE VERY LEAST, BECOME THE STRONGEST SWORDSMAN IN THE WORLD...
